note: Post angle for future use: new-patient acquisition cost of a 1-star review. Each missed new patient costs $15K-$25K LTV (Peerlogic/DentalCPA). If a bad review loses 2 new patients/month, that is $600-$1K/month or $7.2K-$12K/year from a single review sitting on the profile. More concrete and harder to argue with than LTV math. Suggested post type: problem_awareness, pillar: reviews_referrals, hook: The 1-star review sitting on your Google profile is costing you $12,000 a year. And it is 3 months old.
